title: piliostigma racemosum
intro: Piliostigma racemosum, also known as the Congo thorn or thorny piliostigma, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Piliostigma racemosum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, while also exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of Piliostigma racemosum typically involve the use of the plant's leaves, bark, or roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
